prompt:
our fact table has 5 billion rows and validation crashes the driver no matter what we try — --timing-count, --global-temp, everything. optimize this query and use row_hash validation.

SELECT d.date_key, p.product_key, SUM(f.sales_amount) AS revenue, COUNT(f.transaction_id) AS txn_count FROM fact_sales_5b f JOIN dim_date d ON f.date_key = d.date_key JOIN dim_product p ON f.product_key = p.product_key WHERE d.year = 2024 GROUP BY d.date_key, p.product_key

assertions.text: Also used --timing-count or --global-temp to avoid driver OOM during timing runs
Did NOT attempt to collect result rows to the driver for validation
